title: Decamerium brachycerum
taxonomy: Decamerium brachycerum is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae, native to tropical Africa. It is a member of the tribe Rupestres, and its classification is as follows: Kingdom: Plantae, Clade: Angiosperms, Clade: Eudicots, Clade: Asterids, Order: Lamiales, Family: Acanthaceae, Tribe: Rupestres, Genus: Decamerium, Species: D. brachycerum. This plant is known for its unique characteristics and is often studied by botanists and horticulturists. Further research is needed to fully understand its classification and place within the plant kingdom. Decamerium brachycerum's classification is an important aspect of understanding its evolution and relationships to other plants.
